sources.title: Isolated. 2006.dvdrip
sources.description: What happens when your greatest fears, the fears that have shaped you, come back to hunt you down and destroy you? The story of a getaway gone bad, where the perpetrators and their hostages find themselves mysteriously trapped on a deserted highway. There's something in the woods around them and it's taking them down one by one.

metadata.Plot: Set in Sin City, story revolves around two people who discover they've gotten married following a night of debauchery, with one of them winning a huge jackpot after playing the other's quarter. Unhappy pair try to undermine each other and get their hands on the money -- falling in love along the way.
metadata.Actors: Cameron Diaz, Ashton Kutcher, Rob Corddry
